info.name: CineHall API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the CineHall application. Base URL: http://localhost:8000/api/v1

Authentication: Set the `token` collection variable after login to auto-populate the Bearer token on all protected routes.

request.description: Register a new user. Returns a JWT token.
Login with credentials. Returns a JWT token.
Logout the authenticated user. Requires Bearer token.
Refresh the JWT token. Requires Bearer token.
Get the authenticated user's profile.
Update profile information (name, email, password, image).
Delete the authenticated user's account.
Get paginated list of all films (with genre and image). 10 per page.
Search films by title (partial match).
Filter films by genre ID.
Get a specific film by ID.

formdata.value: A mind-bending thriller about dreams within dreams.

formdata.description: One of: G, PG, PG-13, R, NC-17

request.description: Create a new film. Admin only.

formdata.value: An updated description for the film.

formdata.description: One of: G, PG, PG-13, R, NC-17

request.description: Update a film. Admin only. Uses PUT/PATCH method.
Delete a film and its assets. Admin only.
Get all film sessions ordered by start time. 15 per page.
Get a specific film session with film and room details.
Create a new film session. Admin only.
Update a film session. Admin only.
Delete a film session. Admin only.
Get paginated list of all rooms with their seats. 10 per page.
Get a specific room with all its seats.
Create a room and auto-generate its seats. Admin only.
Update a room. Adjusts seats automatically if capacity changes. Admin only.
Delete a room and all its seats. Admin only.
Get all reservations for the authenticated user.
Create a reservation. Seat must belong to the session's room. Reservation expires in 15 minutes if unpaid.
Get a specific reservation with session, film, seat, and ticket details.
Update a reservation's status. Setting status to 'accepted' auto-creates a ticket.
Cancel and delete a reservation.
Download the receipt/ticket PDF for a given ticket ID.
Initiate a Stripe Checkout session for a pending reservation.
Stripe success callback. Records payment and sets reservation to 'accepted'.
Stripe cancel callback. Returns a cancellation message.
Initiate a PayPal transaction for a pending reservation.
PayPal success callback.
PayPal cancel callback.
Get platform statistics. Admin only.
Toggle a user's active/inactive status. Admin only.
Get all genres with their film count.
Get a specific genre with its films.
Create a new genre. Admin only. Name must be unique.
Update a genre name. Admin only.
Delete a genre. Admin only.
